title: Lower Manhattan
summary: The New York setting of Warlords of New York, divided among returning factions and rogue Agents during the hunt for Aaron Keener.

claims.text: Warlords of New York sends SHD Agents to Lower Manhattan to hunt Aaron Keener and his rogue-agent network.
The expansion overview identifies reorganized Rikers, Cleaners and Peacekeepers among the groups operating in Lower Manhattan.
The expansion campaign begins in response to a biological attack that killed civilians and SHD Agents in Lower Manhattan.

paragraphs.text: Lower Manhattan shifts The Division 2 from Washington back to New York, where SHD investigates a biological attack and pursues Keener.
Returning groups are not frozen in their first-game form: official material describes the Rikers and Cleaners as reorganized, while Peacekeepers combine civilians and JTF veterans.

verification.notes: Named zones, missions and collectible locations remain outside this overview.
